name: gpu-search
description: GPU watchlist scanner with eBay search, filtering, scoring and Discord notifications

scripts.test: EBAY_PROVIDER=mock SCANNER_STATE_PATH=/tmp/gpu-search-test-scanner-state.json MARKET_SUMMARY_PATH=/tmp/gpu-search-test-market-summary.json npm run build && EBAY_PROVIDER=mock SCANNER_STATE_PATH=/tmp/gpu-search-test-scanner-state.json MARKET_SUMMARY_PATH=/tmp/gpu-search-test-market-summary.json sh -c 'node --test $(find dist -name "*.test.js")'
